next_steps: Check serum TSH, free T4, and T3 levels
Perform thyroid ultrasound with color Doppler flow assessment
Measure erythrocyte sedimentation rate (ESR) and C-reactive protein (CRP) trending
Consider fine-needle aspiration of the thyroid nodule if ultrasound suggests malignancy or abscess
Consult endocrinology for management of suspected thyroiditis
